rows.label: qev015003_MSG0014
rows.name: No... No... don't come any closer!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0015
rows.name: Stay away! ...STAY AWAAAAY!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0010
rows.name: Calm down

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0011
rows.name: Calm the panicked Fine down.

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0020
rows.name: Shout

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0021
rows.name:
Shout at the panicked Fine to
bring her back to her senses.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0016
rows.name: Ah... Aah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0017
rows.name: Hii...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0018
rows.name:
Y-You are... I see, you
came to save me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0019
rows.name: T-Thank goodness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0020
rows.name: But... guh... Grette is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0021
rows.name: Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah! That girl... ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for the details.

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0040
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0041
rows.name:
Suggest escaping without
asking for further details.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0022
rows.name:
At first, they were going to
eat me... And yet that girl...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0023
rows.name:
"Compared to a human full of excess fat like
that, I am much sweeter and more delicious."
She put up a strong front like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0024
rows.name: Provoking the Bias... ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0100
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0101
rows.name:
Suggest escaping without
asking for further details.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ever since we were locked up in
here, Grette kept saying it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0026
rows.name:
That if Adelbert was gone, she no
longer had any hope to live...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0027
rows.name:
That's why, when they came to kill
us, she said she'd die in my place.
She said we were friends, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0028
rows.name:
To hold onto hope and live in her
stead... That's what she said... hic...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask for the details.

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0080
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0081
rows.name:
Suggest escaping without
asking for further details.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0051
rows.name:
Taking my place, she was
dragged out by them and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0029
rows.name:
They began "preparing" her... But...
when those Bias guys found out her body
was a B.B., they became enraged...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0030
rows.name:
They dismantled her... while she was still alive. Having
her parts torn off one by one right in front of my eyes,
she screamed Adelbert's name... over and over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0031
rows.name:
By the time about half her body
was torn to shreds... she stopped
making a sound. Grette... died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0032
rows.name: Uugh, Grette is... I am... We are...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0033
rows.name: Ah... Aah... AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0070
rows.name: Calm down

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0071
rows.name: Quiet the screaming, crying Fine.

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0090
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0091
rows.name: Suggest escaping immediately.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0035
rows.name: Ah... Aah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0036
rows.name: ...I... I can't forgive them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0037
rows.name: ...But I... I can't forgive them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0038
rows.name:
Please! Massacre all of them!! That is the
last hope that girl entrusted to me!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0039
rows.name:
Those guys... seem to be using the dismantled
Grette for something, they took her somewhere.
They spoke as if they were ordered by someone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0040
rows.name:
Hey... I can't just run away
from here as things are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0041
rows.name:
Please... Hunt down every last one of
them... The Bias, and their boss too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0042
qev015003_MSG0043
rows.name:
Please... Hunt down every last one of
them... The Bias, and their boss too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0044
rows.name: ...Aah... Everything is over, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0045
rows.name:
Adelbert and Grette are both
gone now, but... Those guys
received their retribution too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0046
rows.name: This is... for the best, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0111
rows.name: Nod, saying everything is over.

rows.label: qev015003_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev015003_SEL0121
rows.name:
Admonish her that
revenge breeds nothing.

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0047
rows.name:
Thank you... I'll return to the base
first and explain things to Dirk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0048
rows.name:
I need to properly give you my thanks,
so please come along as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0049
rows.name:
Was I... wrong? Was the hope
Grette wanted to convey to me
not something like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015003_MSG0050
rows.name:
I'll think about it a little while heading
back to the base... I need to properly give
you my thanks, so please come along as well.[ST:wait ]
